LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DEEP SILVER, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - -THE MOTION IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT AS TO THE THIRD AND SEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION, WHICH WERE DISMISSED BY PLAINTIFF ON JULY 26, 2012. AS TO ALL REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION, THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AND THE ALTERNATIVE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G) AND CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976
